description: P0-A Lifecycle SSOT expansion: status enum ACTIVE/RETIRED → ONLINE/OFFLINE/REJECTED/OBSERVATION/RETIRED

changes.name: LIFECYCLE_STATUSES
changes.note: Canonical lifecycle status tuple; source of truth for all status values

changes.name: _LEGACY_STATUS_MAP
changes.note: Backward-compatibility alias map; ACTIVE normalises to ONLINE

changes.name: normalise_lifecycle_status
changes.note: Normalises legacy aliases to canonical lifecycle values

changes.name: _StrategyMeta
changes.note: lifecycle_status mirrors status (canonical); status normalised via _LEGACY_STATUS_MAP

changes.name: list_strategies
changes.signature_after: (lottery_type: Optional[str] = None, lifecycle_status: Optional[str] = None) -> List[dict]
changes.behaviour_after: returns ALL strategies by default; lifecycle_status filter is optional

all_adapter_status_values.note: No strategy was promoted, retired, or changed in governance terms; ONLINE is the canonical form of ACTIVE

migration_plan.note: Current lifecycle state is maintained entirely in-memory (replay_strategy_registry.py). No DB schema change is required for Phase P0. A future migration for persisted lifecycle state would look like:
future_migration_sql: -- Phase P1 optional: persist lifecycle state to DB
ALTER TABLE strategy_replay_runs ADD COLUMN strategy_lifecycle_status TEXT DEFAULT 'ONLINE';
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategy_lifecycle (
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO strategy_lifecycle (strategy_id, lifecycle_status) VALUES
migration_plan.execution_status: NOT EXECUTED — this is a plan artifact only

GET /api/replay/strategies.behaviour_change: Now returns ALL lifecycle states by default (was: ACTIVE only)

GET /api/replay/history.behaviour_change: lifecycle_status filter restricts to matching strategy_ids
